title: VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - MSM 90 Capsules
tags: Beauty>Body, brand_VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY, cat:joints-mobility, cat:skin-hair-nails, cat:sports-nutrition, Conditions>Pain&Inflammation, featured:joints-mobility, gluten-free, Health>Vits&Minerals, proudly-south-african, sa made, Sport>Maintain, sugar-free, vegetarian
body_html:
Targeted Nutrition Support You Can Actually Feel

Finding supplements that are genuinely effective — well-formulated, properly dosed, and honestly marketed — is harder than it should be. VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - MSM 90 Capsules is built for people who've done the reading and want something that actually delivers.

Who It's For

  • Health-conscious individuals who take nutrition seriously
  • People looking for targeted support to complement a solid diet and training foundation
  • Anyone tired of supplements that look impressive on the label but underdeliver in practice
  • Those wanting clean formulations without unnecessary fillers or artificial additives

What It Does

  • Targeted support: Formulated to address specific physiological needs, not to tick every box on a marketing checklist
  • Bioavailability: Uses ingredient forms that your body can absorb and use — because form matters as much as dose
  • Quality assurance: Sourced and manufactured to standards that matter for efficacy and safety
  • Complement your lifestyle: Works best alongside a good diet, regular movement, and adequate sleep

Key Ingredients

Carefully selected active ingredients at doses supported by research, not sprinkled in for label appeal. Clean formulation without the fillers, artificial colours, or unnecessary additives found in many supplements.

How to Use

Follow the recommended dosing on the label and take consistently for meaningful results. Most supplements show their value over weeks of regular use, not overnight. Pair with a diet that supports your health goals.

Available Across South Africa

Available online with nationwide shipping to Cape Town, Johannesburg, Durban, Pretoria, and all major centres across South Africa. Fast dispatch, reliable delivery direct to your door.

Good supplements support good habits. They don't replace them — but when the foundation is solid, the right support makes a real difference.

title: VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - Coenzyme Q10 60 Capsules
tags: brand_VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY, cat:brain-cognitive, cat:energy-vitality, cat:gut-health, cat:heart-cardiovascular, cat:vitamins-minerals, Conditions>Anti-Ageing, Conditions>Cardio, Conditions>Colesterol, featured:energy-vitality, featured:heart-cardiovascular, gluten-free, Health>Antioxidants, proudly-south-african, sa made, sugar-free, vegetarian
body_html:
Your Gut Runs the Show — Give It What It Needs

Digestive health isn't just about avoiding bloating. The gut microbiome influences immunity, mental health, nutrient absorption, and systemic inflammation. VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - Coenzyme Q10 60 Capsules supports a healthy, balanced gut ecosystem from the inside.

Who It's For

  • Anyone dealing with bloating, irregular digestion, or post-antibiotic gut disruption
  • People with IBS symptoms or general digestive sensitivity
  • Those focused on immune resilience — 70% of immune tissue lines the gut
  • Anyone who's been through a period of poor diet, stress, or illness

What It Does

  • Microbial diversity: Restores and maintains a healthy balance of gut bacteria
  • Digestive comfort: Reduces bloating, gas, and irregularity
  • Immune support: Beneficial bacteria train and modulate immune responses
  • Gut-brain axis: Gut bacteria produce neurotransmitter precursors — your mood and gut are more connected than most people realise
  • Nutrient absorption: A healthy microbiome improves absorption efficiency from your food

Key Ingredients

Multi-strain probiotic formula delivering clinically relevant colony-forming units (CFUs) of well-researched strains. Formulated to survive the acidic stomach environment and reach the intestines intact.

How to Use

Take on an empty stomach or with a small amount of food. Consistent daily use yields better results than sporadic dosing. For post-antibiotic use, start immediately and continue for at least 4 weeks.

Available Across South Africa

Ships nationwide with delivery to Cape Town, Johannesburg, Durban, Pretoria, and beyond.

Fix the gut, fix a lot of other things. It's a foundational one.
